text: Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language known for its simplicity and readability. It was created by Guido van Rossum and first released in 1991. Python supports multiple programming paradigms including procedural, object-oriented, and functional programming. Python is widely used in data science, machine learning, web development, automation, and scientific computing. The Python Package Index (PyPI) hosts hundreds of thousands of third-party packages. Python uses indentation to define code blocks instead of curly braces. Popular Python frameworks include Django and Flask for web development, NumPy and Pandas for data analysis, and TensorFlow and PyTorch for machine learning.
